home.gravityMazeCardDescription: A compact Android puzzle game about changing gravity in a maze to find the best path to the exit.
home.gravityMazeCardImageAlt: Gravity Maze screenshot with puzzle board, player, fragments, and exit.

game.title: Gravity Maze
game.description: Rotate the maze, slide through narrow corridors, collect stars and other bonuses, and reach the exit before the maze catches up with you.
game.aboutParagraphOne: Gravity Maze is a minimalist puzzle game where you rotate the entire maze to guide a falling ball to the exit.
game.aboutParagraphTwo: Rotate the maze, control gravity, avoid obstacles, and solve increasingly complex levels. Every rotation changes the world around you, and every move matters.
